description_long: This object is a tall, angular structure with a robust, industrial design, primarily composed of dark metallic panels. It features a vertical main body with a reinforced base and a series of geometric cutouts and support struts, giving it a sturdy, engineered appearance. Along one side, there are illuminated blue indicator lights or markings arranged in a linear pattern, suggesting a technological or electrical function. The top section includes several protruding components, likely for electrical connections or insulator mounts, and a thick cable or wire extends vertically from the top. The surface is matte with subtle wear, indicating exposure to outdoor urban environments. The overall form is utilitarian, optimized for supporting and protecting high-voltage electrical equipment.
description: A tall, angular metallic structure with blue illuminated markings, support struts, and a thick cable extending from the top, designed for urban electrical infrastructure.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular body, support struts, and protruding top components.
description_view_1: Narrow edge view highlighting the vertical row of blue illuminated markings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with visible support struts and top electrical fittings.
description_view_3: Direct front view emphasizing the full length of blue illuminated markings and the central cable.
attribute_arrangement_of_crossarms: There is a single, vertically aligned crossarm structure at the top, with components extending horizontally for cable attachment.
attribute_configuration_of_attached_powe: A single circuit with a vertically routed cable extends from the top, suggesting a simple, parallel configuration for power transmission.
